write_md_to: 查询指标/FY2025_功能使用年度总结_通用图表版.md

series.name: 自定义报表_覆盖工厂数
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT orgId) AS c FROM trace_log_dp WHERE dat BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND event='PageView' AND get_json_string(eventValues,'$.url') LIKE '%/customDashboard/detail%'

series.name: 自定义报表_PV
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(1) AS c FROM trace_log_dp WHERE dat BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND event='PageView' AND get_json_string(eventValues,'$.url') LIKE '%/customDashboard/detail%'

series.name: 多维进销存_覆盖工厂数
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT orgId) AS c FROM trace_log_dp WHERE dat BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND event='PageView' AND get_json_string(eventValues,'$.url') LIKE '%multiInventoryReport%'

series.name: 多维进销存_PV
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(1) AS c FROM trace_log_dp WHERE dat BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND event='PageView' AND get_json_string(eventValues,'$.url') LIKE '%multiInventoryReport%'

series.name: TV_覆盖工厂数
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT orgId) AS c FROM trace_log_dp WHERE dat BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND event='tv-device-info'

series.name: 协同任务_覆盖工厂数
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT org_id) AS c FROM dt_collaborative_task WHERE created_at::date BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}'

series.name: 委外管理_收货工厂数
series.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT org_id) AS c FROM dt_outsource_post WHERE created_at::date BETWEEN DATE '{{start}}' AND DATE '{{end}}' AND post_type_name='收货' AND COALESCE(deleted_at,0)=0

report.title: FY2025 功能使用年度总结（通用图表技能示例）
report.subtitle: 本页由「配置驱动」生成，样式参考 周报/趋势图表-3月.html。指标为示例：覆盖工厂数与 PV；可按业务继续扩展 series 与 charts。
report.output_html: FY2025_功能使用年度总结_通用图表版.html
